rows.source_ref: "Best proven trading systems", ForexFactory thread by ZeusDaMan (6 posts, 2021), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1299635/best-proven-trading-systems
rows.concept: A trader asks the forum which 'proven' systems have credible proof, pointing at the 'Trading Made Simple' thread, but no trading rules are given.
rows.eligibility_reason: No strategy content: thread is purely a request for proof/screenshots, references TMS thread but states no entry/exit/params to implement.
rows.notes: Mentions 'Trading Made Simple' (TMS) thread as most 'proof-having' (screenshots only, no myfxbook/TE links) and emmanuel7788 MT5 backtests; TMS itself is a separate 7000+ page thread not included here. Nothing actionable in this PDF.
